generic.title: Generic / Any Industry
generic.description: A sector-agnostic framing suitable for any organisation. Scenarios will not be filtered to a specific industry. Use this when running a mixed-industry exercise or when the players' organisation does not fit one of the named verticals.

banking.title: Banking & Financial Services
banking.description: Retail, commercial, private and investment banking, payments, and capital markets. Scenarios assume regulators such as the FCA/PRA/ECB, frameworks like DORA and PS21/3, and concerns such as SWIFT/payment fraud, KYC/AML, and client confidentiality.

healthcare.title: Healthcare & Life Sciences
healthcare.description: Hospitals, clinics, insurers, pharmaceuticals, and medical devices. Concerns include patient safety, electronic health records, HIPAA / NHS Data Security and Protection Toolkit, clinical trial integrity, and medical device security.

retail.title: Retail & E-commerce
retail.description: Bricks-and-mortar retailers, e-commerce platforms, hospitality and consumer goods. Concerns include PCI DSS, point-of-sale malware, loyalty/account takeover, peak-trading availability, and customer-facing reputational impact.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing & Industrial
manufacturing.description: Discrete and process manufacturing, automotive, aerospace, and heavy industry. Concerns include OT/ICS security, IP theft, production line continuity, supply chain integrity, and safety-critical control systems.

government.title: Government & Public Sector
government.description: Central and local government, defence, law enforcement, and public services. Concerns include citizen data, classified information handling, NCSC/CISA guidance, FOI obligations, and high-visibility political and media impact.

tech_saas.title: Technology & SaaS
tech_saas.description: Software vendors, SaaS providers, cloud platforms, and digital-native businesses. Concerns include multi-tenant data isolation, customer breach notification under SLAs, source-code and CI/CD pipeline security, and downstream supply chain impact.

energy_utilities.title: Energy & Utilities
energy_utilities.description: Electricity, gas, water and renewables. Concerns include critical national infrastructure obligations (NIS2 / CAF), SCADA and OT security, grid stability, public safety impact, and coordinated regulator engagement.

education.title: Education & Research
education.description: Schools, colleges, universities and research institutes. Concerns include student data, research IP, federated identity, BYOD environments, and limited security budgets relative to attack surface.

legal_professional_services.title: Legal & Professional Services
legal_professional_services.description: Law firms, accountancies, consultancies and other professional service firms. Concerns include privileged client data, conflict-of-interest walls, regulator (SRA / ICAEW) obligations, and trust-driven reputational damage.
